attributes-to-log-regex.name: attributes-to-log-regex

properties./Dataset_Description: This Breast Cancer Dataset contains a collection of patients with MMGs who have confirmed benign or malignant breast lessions or no findings

properties.entity:Episode:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Episode1_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Episode1_Type" AS	TypeOriginal,
		"Episode1_Number" AS EpisodeNumber,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Tumor:
SELECT 	"Tumor_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Topography : Organ" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySiteCode" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		1 AS Episode,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Patient:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Population" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Gender" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS BirthSexEucaim,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:ImagingProcedure:
SELECT 	"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureIdentifier" As ProcedureIdentifier,
		 1 as ImagingTimepoint,
		"ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode" AS ImagingProcedureEUCAIM,
		"Imaging procedure" AS ImagingProcedureOriginal,
		1 as Episode,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping:patient_birth_sex:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Gender' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Gender" AS originalValue,
		'patient_birth_sex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:PrimaryCancerCondition:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CASE
        	WHEN "PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis" NOT IN ('?', '', 'NA', 'null')
        	THEN CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE)
        	ELSE NULL
    	END AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		1 as EpisodeNumber,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept" AS AgeUnitEUCAIM,
		"Pathology" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourEUCAIM,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping:cancer_condition_histology_morph:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Pathology' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Pathology" AS originalValue,
		'cancer_condition_histology_morphology' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Dataset:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Title" AS Title,
		"Dataset_Description" AS Description,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping:body_site_location:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Topography' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Topography" AS originalValue,
		'body_site_location' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_BodySiteCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping:procedure_code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Imaging procedure' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Imaging procedure" AS originalValue,
		'procedure_code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 3 for clinical data:
* Clinical data tabular inputs are mapped and converted to a relational model.
* Mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
